name: E-procurement System
long_description: The system helps organizations improve operational efficiency by reducing manual paperwork, minimizing processing time, enhancing transparency, and ensuring compliance with procurement policies and workflows. It also provides real-time monitoring of procurement activities, approval tracking, document management, and reporting features to support better decision-making and accountability. By digitizing procurement operations, the E-Procurement System promotes faster transaction processing, accurate record keeping, improved supplier coordination, and optimized resource management across departments.
higlights: Streamlined procurement workflows through automated purchase request and approval processes.
Centralized supplier management for efficient vendor information tracking and maintenance.
Reduced manual paperwork and processing delays through digital procurement transactions.
Improved transparency and accountability with real-time procurement monitoring and status tracking.
Enhanced compliance with standardized procurement policies and approval hierarchies.

name: Queueing System
long_description: A Queueing System is a digital solution designed to manage and organize client or customer flow efficiently within an organization or service area. It automates the process of queue generation, service assignment, client monitoring, and transaction tracking to reduce waiting time and improve overall service delivery.
higlights: Automated queue number generation and client registration process.
Reduced waiting time through organized and real-time queue management.
Enabled real-time monitoring and calling of clients by service personnel.
Improved customer experience through a structured and transparent queueing process.
Centralized transaction tracking and client information management.
Enhanced operational efficiency by minimizing manual queue handling.
Supported multiple service categories and transaction workflows.

name: IPPMIS
long_description: Integrated Personnel Payroll Management System designed to automate the employees payroll and provide robust solution to templates.
higlights: Built and deployed the project from the ground up
Developed Scalable Codebase and Modular Architecture
Collaborated with the senior developer to ensure code quality and solutions aligned with development standards
Deployed the application on IIS, utilizing an in-house server to make it publicly accessible

name: Website Portfolio V1
long_description: A modern and responsive portfolio website built with ReactJS, SASS, and JavaScript, using Vite for fast builds and optimized performance. It showcases my projects, technical skills, and experience with a clean, user-friendly interface.
higlights: Implemented smooth and engaging UI animations to enhance user experience and visual flow.
Designed clean, modern interfaces with strong attention to layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy.
Built fully responsive components that adapt seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
Applied mobile-first design principles to ensure performance and usability on all screen sizes.
Optimized animations for performance to maintain fast load times and smooth interactions.
Used reusable and scalable design patterns for consistent UI across the application.

name: Ordering System
long_description: Ordering System for a restaurant. It consist of 4 user roles: Admin, Manager, Cashier and Customer, Aims to creates a list of orders to a restaurant through a web system. It also has Point of Sale (POS) with thermal printing for physical transactions and inventory for managing stocks. It has responsive design to be able to be used in any kind of devices like mobile, tablet, laptop, and pc.
higlights: Built and deployed the project from the ground up
Developed Scalable Codebase and Modular Architecture
Deployed the application on IIS, utilizing an in-house server to make it publicly accessible

name: POS System
long_description: A Point of Sale System designed for retail stores to manage sales transactions,inventory and generate reports.
higlights: Built and deployed the project from the ground up
Developed to be used by retail stores nationwide
Beaureu of Internal Revenue accredited software
Deployed the application on premise server of the client

name: Anti Scam App
long_description: An Anti Scam Mobile Application that allows users to live track other users during transactions to ensure legitimacy.
higlights: Used to live track other user to ensure the legitimacy of the transaction
Implemented Firebase Authentication for secure user login and registration
Utilized SupaBase for efficient data storage and retrieval
Integrated Google API for enhanced app functionality

name: Alumni System
long_description: An alumni system that allows graduates to connect, network, and engage with their alma mater through a web platform.
higlights: Allows alumni to see job opennings and apply through the web platform
In charge of developing the Landing page and Alumni Directory
Collaborated with co-developer to ensure code quality and solutions aligned with development standards
Developed dynamic Analytics functionality that adapts to end-user input for insights and trends
Utilized a backend deployed on Vercel
